lines.text: Joey and now Rachel's apartment, Joey has the fridge pulled out away from the wall and is in the process of pulling off the cooling grate behind it.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well that thing is clearing in the way! All right. Ah-ha! (He grabs a screwdriver and starts to attack the compressor, only he causes a small short circuit and shocks himself.) Ah-ah!! Damn fridge!
Rachel enters from her new room.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi Joey, how ya doin'?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Great! Roomie!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Huh, yeah I guess we are roommates now.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! Well, now that you brought it up, our fridge is broken. We have to get a new one. Now, I checked around and your half is $400. Thanks a lot.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm not paying for half of that! I'm only staying here until my apartment gets fixed.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look Rach, my parents bought this fridge just after I was born, okay? Now, I have never had a problem with it. Then you show up and it breaks! What does that tell ya'?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That refrigerators don't live as long as people.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, now you know that the ATM will only lets you take out 300 at a time, I'll take a check for the other hundred.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You're jokin' right?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Of course I'm jokin'! I don't take checks.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Thank God you're pretty. (Exits.)
Opening Credits
Central Perk, Joey, Chandler, Monica, and Phoebe are there as Rachel enters.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Hi! Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Do you guys know any cute guys?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, of course I do! My good friend Joey over here. (Pats Joey's arm, Joey pats Chandler's shoulder, and Chandler motions for Joey to say the same about him.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, I'm sorry. Thank you Chandler.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Anyway, there's this big charity ball this weekend and Ralph Lauren bought a table, so I kinda have to go...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What's the charity?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I don't know, something either trees or disease-Ralph mumbles a lot.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Does Ralph mumble when you're not paying attention?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah! It's weird. But the thing is need to find a date.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, what kind of guy are you looking for?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, someone that has his own tux, or has the ability to rent a tux.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So he has to be a male who has at least $50.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ooh! So close.
Ross and Elizabeth enter.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey everybody!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey uh, this is Elizabeth.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Oh hi!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: I'm the student.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (laughs) Isn't she cute? (On Monica's death stare) No!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Y'know, this is probably none of my business, but weren't you guys supposed to not be seen in public together?

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Oh, we're not together.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh no-no-no, we're just two people who happen to run into each other here at the coffee house. (He winks at her.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, sly.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Well, I really wanted to meet you guys, but I have to run. I'll see you later?

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Okay!

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Bye Ross.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Bye.
They kiss.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Oops! I did not mean to run into you like that sir.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh that is quite all right ma'am. (Elizabeth exits.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So, why is she leaving? Is it a school night and she has a lot of homework to do?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes, her molecular epidemiology paper is due tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, tell her good luck with that.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Anyone else? Huh? Bring 'em on!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oo! When's her birthday?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I don't know Rachel, why?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, y'know it's just been so long since I've been to Chuckie Cheese.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, I like Elizabeth.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well thanks!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah. In fact, I like her so much you tell her I want my cookies early this year! Y'know, a box of Thin Mints and some Tag-a-Longs.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey-hey come on you guys, give him a break. Ross, seriously, how's it going with her?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, actually it's been great. She's 20 so she's not looking for anything too serious, which is perfect for me right now.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well that is great. And seriously, she seems very nice.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thanks. I know you guys like to give me a hard time and all, but it really means a lot to me that you like her. Just knowing that you guys are...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (interrupting) Okay, I got a good one. Okay, umm, what is she? Like 12?
Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe's, Chandler is sitting at the table and Monica is doing something in the kitchen.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler, do you think we talk about our relationship enough?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah. Do we have any Fruit Roll-Ups?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, I just thought of the perfect guy for Rachel to take to her thing.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh that's so funny because we found someone too.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh that's good, I guess she'll have a choice between my guy and your weirdo.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Why would our guy be a weirdo?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: 'Cause that's just your taste.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (laughs sarcastically) Rachel is not going to pick your stupid guy.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh yeah?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: My guy is a lawyer who has volunteer work. And, he has one of these (She squeezes the skin on her chin together to form...)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: A face ass?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: A chin dimple!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, uh y'know, our guy works with Chandler and he's really nice and smart and he's a great dresser!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Have you seen your guy's body?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, our guy is just a floating head.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well my guy is spectacular. Okay? He's a massage client and one time umm, when he was on the table, I looked at it. And I mean all of it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You're not supposed to look!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh yeah, like there are police for that!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (horrified) Wait! You look? You-you massaged me.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I know. (Laughs.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right fine, your guy may have a great body, but our guy is really funny.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, Chandler funny?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Our guy's a great dancer!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: My guy is well read.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Our guy has great hair.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: My guy has great teeth!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Our guy smells incredible.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (To Chandler) Do you want our guy to be your guy?
Joey and Rachel's apartment, Chandler is entering to find Joey bingeing on the food from the fridge. Joey isn't doing all that well.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Huh.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, you...don't look good Joe.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: The fridge broke. I have to eat everything. Cold cuts, ice cream, limes-Hey, what was in that brown jar?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's still in there?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Not anymore. So anyway, how do you want to pay me?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Is this a service you're providing me?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! No! No! For my new fridge-our new fridge!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Our new fridge? I don't live here anymore.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So what? Look, suppose we were a divorced couple.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Uh-huh.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: And I got custody of the kid, right? Now suppose the kid dies and-and I gotta buy a new kid.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (not quite sure where Joey's going and is a little worried) Okay...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (pause) Give me $400!
Ross's office, he's unlocking his office door as Elizabeth walks up.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Professor Geller?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hmm? (Turns around and sees that its Elizabeth) Oh, a student I don't know.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: I was wondering if I could talk to you for a moment?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes, yes of course, what-what would this be regarding?

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Making out in your office.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Shh! (Laughs then composes himself) Of course, why don't we go inside?
They go inside and Ross closes the door. When he turns around Elizabeth walks up to him, pushes him back against the door, and starts kissing him.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh-ooh!

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Doorknob! Doorknob!

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Oh! Sorry! Umm, I actually do need to talk to you.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, okay. What-what about?

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Spring vacation.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Spring vacation.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Yeah, we have time off and a lot of people are going on trips...
Another professor barges in.

lines.speaker: Professor Feesen
lines.text: Professor Geller!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (quickly jumping away from Elizabeth) Yes, professor Feesen-sen-stenlger... I'll be with you in one moment. (To Elizabeth) So, I will take one box of the Thin Mints. (And he ushers Elizabeth out of the office.)
Joey and Rachel's apartment, Ross, Chandler, and Joey are entering.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You don't understand! Elizabeth was about to ask me to go on a trip with her! Is that taking it slow?! No, I'm not ready for this! Okay? What-what do I tell her?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Just tell her the truth! Tell her you're not ready.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I can do that. Oh-oh, what if she gets upset?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Then you distract her with a Barbie doll.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Or! You can just, y'know... (He walks up close to whisper in Ross's ear and when he gets there he pushes Ross into the fridge.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What the hell are you doing?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What? What the hell am I doing? You just broke my fridge!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?! What? How do you, how do you even know its broken?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh-ho-ho, you think I don't know what breaks my fridge? Excuse me! (He opens the door and feels inside.) Well what do you know! Broken! That'll be $400!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Joey, I saw you push him!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (pause) You pushed him!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Joey, I did not break this! Okay? (He opens the freezer and smells inside and recoils in disgust.) That has been broken for a while.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right. Chandler, do you remember how I told you about our fridge?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Uh-huh.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I still haven't gotten a check for your half yet.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Do not give him any money!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm not talking to you! You broke my fridge!
Ross's office, he's opening the door to Elizabeth.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: You wanted to see me Professor Geller?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes. Yes! Please, come in.
She does so, he closes the door, and she pushes him against the doorknob again.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oo-oo!

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Doorknob?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, it kinda grows on you. (They both laugh.) Actually, I wanted to finish talking to you about uh, spring vacation.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Oh good.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look, I... (He has trouble sitting in his chair.) Look, I'm having a great time with you and I just don't want us to move to fast or put to much pressure on us. So, I'm sorry I just don't think we should go away together yet. It's-it's too soon.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Ross, I think you misunderstood what I was saying. I just wanted to tell you that I'm going to Florida for a couple weeks.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No. I think you misunderstood what I was saying. What I meant was...

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: You are so adorable.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That! Let's talk about that.
Central Perk, Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe are there as Ross enters.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey! How did it go with Elizabeth?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Huh? Oh-oh, it was fine. Uh, it was just a misunderstanding. She didn't want me to go with her. She just wanted to let me know that she's going to Florida for spring vacation.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Wait a minute, is she going for spring vacation or is she going for spring break? (Does a little whooping/party noise.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What's-what's the difference?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, spring vacation is doing nice things with your grandparents. Spring break you're doing frat guys.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, y'know what? Not all spring breaks are like that.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What did you do on yours?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I went to Egypt with my dad.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I can see it now, "Look dad, it's the Sphinx!" (Does that party noise again.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, I think Elizabeth is a little more serious than, "Spring break!" (Imitates the party noise.) All right? I mean she's taken my class!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And slept with the professor.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm gonna call her.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah.
Ross leaves to do so and Rachel enters with a guy.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey! You guys umm, I want you to meet Sebastian.

lines.speaker: Sebastian
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: We just uh, we just met at the newsstand. We both grabbed for the last Field & Stream. (Chandler's shocked.) What? I read that.

lines.speaker: Sebastian
lines.text: Can I get you a cup of coffee?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh yes! Thank you! (He does so and Rachel sits down on the couch.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Rachel, what the hell is this?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (shocked) What?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You ask us to find you a guy and you come traipsing in here with your own!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You found me a guy?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yes! We found you a really cute and funny guy from Chandler's work!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah and I-I found you one too who is not a weirdo.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, y'know what though you guys? I really appreciate that but I think I'm just gonna take Sebastian to the charity.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Are you sure?! Because our guy smells incredible!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Uh, would you stop it with that already?!
Sebastian returns with the coffee.

lines.speaker: Sebastian
lines.text: Here you go. (Hands her, her cup.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, thank you.

lines.speaker: Sebastian
lines.text: Sure.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: So, Sebastian, do you do any volunteer work?

lines.speaker: Sebastian
lines.text: Uh, no not really. Why?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No reason, it's just I know a single guy that cares about other people.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Are you funny?

lines.speaker: Sebastian
lines.text: Excuse me?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What are you guys doing?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Are you funny? Tell us a joke!

lines.speaker: Sebastian
lines.text: Look, I just wanted to have coffee with Rachel.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, so do a lot of people.

lines.speaker: Sebastian
lines.text: Actually, I uh, I gotta get going. (To Rachel) Give me a call sometime.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, but y'know, no, you didn't give me your phone number.

lines.speaker: Sebastian
lines.text: Okay! See you later! (Exits.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (To Monica) Turns out he is kinda funny.
Commercial Break
Central Perk, continued from earlier.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I cannot believe you guys! He was really nice and he left because of you!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, but Sebastian? What is that? A cat's name?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, y'know what I noticed Rachel? He scares easy. Is that the kind of guy you'd like to take to a ball? "Hey Sebastian, would you like to dance?" (Imitates him.) "Uhh, okay-I gotta go!"

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right guys stop it. Rachel, we're very sorry that is a very insensitive thing for us to do. And y'know what? Let us make it up to you, we have two really great guys for you.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah! What have you got to lose? Y'know you might even end up with someone really special (whispers) if you pick my guy.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, so you will meet our guys?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes, I'll meet 'em.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay now it doesn't matter which one you choose, y'know? It's completely up to you. Our guy is perfect, or you can go out with the guy Phoebe deemed not good enough to go out with herself.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Pheebs! There you are! Okay, you broke my fridge; you owe me 400 bucks!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay sure!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Really?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh, technically you owe me $600 for sending out happy thoughts on your last ten auditions.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Call it even?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay.
Ross returns.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (To Ross) Well, there you are! So what did Elizabeth say?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, it turns out that she is going to Daytona for spring break woo-hoo. That means, that means wet T-shirt contests, guys doing shots off of girl's bodies, waking up next to people you don't even know...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Man, she is going to have a great time! Is she staying at the Hotel Corona?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You know the hotels?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sure! I was there! Spring Break '81! Woo-hoo!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: In 1981 you were 13!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So what? I drove down, sold T-shirts, had a blast. And y'know who knows how to party? Drunk college chicks.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, she can't go.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ross, you can't tell her not to go. You just started dating.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Then what am I supposed to do?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Nothing, you just have to be cool with it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, what is she goes down and-and sleeps with a bunch of guys?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, maybe you don't marry this one.
Elizabeth's apartment, she is packing for her trip as Ross watches.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm so glad you're going on this trip!

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Yeah! I've been working so hard this semester. I really need to go crazy y'know, blow off some steam.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Sure. Sure. Look I don't, I don't know if your plans are finalized yet, but umm, hey I-I know another great way to blow off steam.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Are you into crafts at all?

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Ross, are you okay?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, yeah, of-of course I'm okay! What? I'm just being supportive. Supportive of you and this whole trip, and-and (notices something) what-what is uh, what's this? (He holds up a rather skimpy bathing suit.)

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: It's a bathing suit?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: To wear in front of people?

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Is that supportive?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Is this?!
Central Perk, Rachel is reading as Monica and Chandler enter.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Good-good-good-good.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We're really glad you decided to meet our guy.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You're gonna like him so much. So umm, when do you want to meet him?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I don't know. I know I don't work late tomorrow night.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Tomorrow night is good. Tomorrow night is good, but uh, y'know what? Why put off something till tomorrow that you can do right now? (Laughs) Eldad come here! (He stands up from the next table.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Eldad, this is Rachel.

lines.speaker: Eldad
lines.text: How are you?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well-well a little blind sided but y'know good.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Eldad, sit down. (To Rachel) Move over! Move over now!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I-Ohh! (Moves over and lets Eldad sit on the couch.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: There you go! There you are! (Rachel stares at Monica and Chandler)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay! Okay! We can take a hint! (They start to leave but run into Phoebe with her guy in tow.) (To Phoebe) What are you doing here?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: This is Patrick. (Points to him.)

lines.speaker: Patrick
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hi. (To Phoebe) Okay, you're too late okay? Because she's already with our guy.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (looks) Oh my God, you're right! I am too late; they're sitting on the couch and talking! (To Patrick) Come on! (They go over to the couch.) Rachel?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: This is Patrick.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, hi.

lines.speaker: Patrick
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, this is the guy I was telling you about.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah. And believe me, this suit does not do justice to what's underneath it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh-okay, but Pheebs?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm just sort of in the middle of something.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! Okay! Yeah, that's okay. (To Patrick) Have a seat. (Sits Patrick down next to Rachel.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No! You can't do that!

lines.speaker: Eldad
lines.text: Maybe I should go!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (stopping him) Sit down! We're winning!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, y'know what? Maybe I should go!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: (Chandler stops her) No-no-no-no! Have a seat! Have a seat!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Rachel! Rachel! You haven't touched Eldad's hair!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It is the softest hair! Touch it! (Both he and Monica do so.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, I'm good.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Rachel? Patrick is really rich. (To Patrick) Give her some money.

lines.speaker: Patrick
lines.text: Y'know what Phoebe? This isn't really worth the free massage.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's right Patrick, bye-bye!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (To Rachel) Eldad is much more cooperative! And he can dance! (To Eldad) You dance for Rachel!
He starts to get up, but Rachel stops him.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No-no! Don't dance for me! Please? Don't! (She gets up to yell at her 'friends.') What is the matter with you guys?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, okay, let's talk it out.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I... Am I the only one that this is embarrassing for?

lines.speaker: Eldad
lines.text: I'm a little embarrassed. (Chandler shushes him.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'll tell ya who should be embarrassed! It's you guys! Come on! This is ridiculous! Thank you very much, but I do not need you to get me a date!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Then why did she ask us to...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I am still talking!! And then you chase away the one guy that I actually liked! I mean, no offense to you guys. Really! I mean (To Patrick) congratulations on all the cash, (He nods) and-and y'know-(Feels Eldad's hair)-Wow! You do have very soft hair! But I would much rather go to the ball all by myself than go through anymore of this! Good-bye! (Grabs her stuff, starts to leave, then turns back suddenly, and to Eldad) Now do you use some sort of special conditioner on that hair?!

lines.speaker: Eldad
lines.text: Yes, Papaya Extract.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Thank you! (Storms out.)
The airport, Elizabeth's flight is about to leave and Ross is there to send her off.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So uh, have a great time down there.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: I will.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah. And did you, did you pack that bathing suit?

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It was pretty funny when I, when I hid it for a while, huh? Anyway, umm, I-I am worried about that bathing suit, not because it's revealing which I'm fine with, no I'm concerned about your health, sun exposure.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Oh, don't worry I have plenty of sun block, it's SPF-30.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, if what's in the bottle is actually 30. I mean sometimes you get 30, sometimes it's-it's get 4, and I swear to God more often than not it's just milk.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Ross, it's going to be okay. I'm not going down there to hook up with a bunch of guys. I really like you. I like how things are going between us.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Yeah! I'm just going down there to relax and hang out with my friends.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay. Cool.

lines.speaker: Elizabeth
lines.text: Oh hey! Here they are!
A group of about 10 guys and no women come running around the corner.

lines.speaker: Guy
lines.text: Elizabeth!
The guys pick up Elizabeth and carry her onto the plane as she waves bye.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Call me!
Ending Credits
Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe's, Rachel, Chandler, and Phoebe are there.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Rachel, we're sorry for pushing those guys on you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh that's all right! Y'know, I ended up having a really good time. Y'know, the charity was a big success and they raised a lot of money and awareness.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So what was it for anyway?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I wanna say a disease.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I just got this really weird message from Ross. He said turn on MTV.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Huh. All right.
Rachel does so and it's one of those dance party shows they have during spring break and we see...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God, look! That's Elizabeth!
Suddenly Ross jumps in and starts dancing with her.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh-oh Professor Geller.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ahh, to be 13 again.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah.
End
